examples: The family took off for Florida
The plane took off two hours late

meanings.definition: take time off from work; stop working temporarily
mimic or imitate in an amusing or satirical manner
examples: This song takes off from a famous aria
take off your shirt--it's very hot in here

meanings.definition: get started or set in motion, used figuratively
examples: the project took a long time to get off the ground
subtract this amount from my paycheck
